description: Present a citable accessible public dashboard with bounded review evidence.

gates.evidence: Automated 64-test browser matrix passed with 44 screenshot hashes bound to commit 8e695ab711bb41c4af87c93371912dbaa4db3e70; responsive, axe, keyboard, semantic graph and provenance-link defects are remediated. Accountable scoped VoiceOver, visual and provenance review remains absent.
